signals.trend: Short-drama app cluster colonizes the US free chart
signals.why: Three short-drama apps (DramaWave, StoryReel, VibeShort) sit inside Apple's US Top-25 Free simultaneously — Kunlun's DramaWave/FreeReels stack is converting the category's download lead into chart permanence.
signals.evidence: App 'DramaWave - Dramas & Reels' by SKYWORK AI PTE LTD holds the US Top-Free top 15, with StoryReel and VibeShort also in the top 25.

watchlist.trend: Prediction-market apps entrench atop the App Store
watchlist.why: Kalshi's World Cup app held #6 on Apple's US Top Free chart with Polymarket in the top 25 — sustained chart dominance, not a spike, deepening the share shift away from listed sportsbooks (DKNG, FLUT).
watchlist.evidence: App 'Kalshi: Trade the World Cup' by KalshiEX LLC is #6 on Apple Top Free Apps (US).

sources.name: CNBC
sources.title: World Cup boosts prediction market volumes
